/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -march=native -ffast-math CMakeFiles/storaged.dir/tools/storaged.cc.o CMakeFiles/storaged.dir/generated_proto/meta_service.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/storaged.dir/generated_proto/meta_service.grpc.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/storaged.dir/generated_proto/storage_service.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/storaged.dir/generated_proto/storage_service.grpc.pb.cc.o -o cedar-storaged  libcedar.a libcedar_graph.a libcedar_cypher.a libcedar_queryd.a -lgRPC::grpc++ -lpthread libcedar_graph.a libcedar_gcn.a libcedar.a -llz4 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libprotobuf.so -lyaml-cpp::yaml-cpp third_party/braft/output/lib/libbraft.a /usr/local/lib/libbrpc.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libgflags.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libprotobuf.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libleveldb.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -ldl -lz -lrt -lgRPC::grpc++ -lgflags
